HGSS.1039.0009:
[0205]By looking at the numbers on the sides of
[0205]the cards, you can see the hidden number
[0205]and VOLTORB totals.
HGSS.1039.0010:
[0205]Touch “Open Memo” to open the Memo Window.
[0205]Touch the cards to add and remove marks.
HGSS.1039.0011:
[0205]If you flip the cards in this order,
[0205]you’ll collect: 3 x 1 x 2 x 1 x 3...
[0205]A total of 18 Coins! And then...
HGSS.1039.0013:
[0205]But if you find VOLTORB,
[0205]you’ll lose all your Coins!
HGSS.1039.0014:
You’ve gathered 50,000 Coins.
You cannot gather any more.\f
HGSS.1039.0025:
VOLTORB Flip is a game in which you flip
over cards to find numbers hidden\r
beneath them.\f
The cards are hiding the numbers
1 through 3...and VOLTORB as well.\f
The first number you flip over will give
you that many Coins.\f
From then on, the next number you
find will multiply the total amount of\r
Coins you’ve collected by that number.\f
If it’s a 2, your total will be multiplied
by “x2.”\f
If it’s a 3, your total will be multiplied
by “x3.”\f
But if you flip over a VOLTORB, it’s
game over.\f
When that happens, you’ll lose all the
Coins you’ve collected in the\r
current game.\f
If you select “Quit,” you’ll withdraw
from the game.\f
If you get to a difficult spot, you might
want to end the game early.\f
Once you’ve found all the hidden
2 and 3 cards, you’ve cleared\r
the game.\f
Once you’ve flipped over all these
cards, then you’ll advance to the\r
next level.\f
As you move up in levels, you will be
able to receive more Coins.\r
Do your best!\f
HGSS.1039.0026:
The numbers at the side of the board
give you a clue about the numbers\r
hidden on the backs of the panels.\f
The larger the number, the more likely
it is that there are many large numbers\r
hidden in that row or column.\f
In the same way, you can tell how many
VOLTORB are hidden in the row\r
or column.\f
Consider the hidden number totals and
the VOLTORB totals carefully as you flip\r
over panels.\f
HGSS.1039.0027:
Select “Open Memo” to mark
the cards.\f
You can mark the cards with the
numbers 1 through 3, but also with a\r
VOLTORB mark.\f
When you have an idea of the numbers
hidden on the back of the cards, touch\f
“Open Memo” and select the cards
to mark.\f
If you want to remove a mark, touch the
mark again, and it will disappear.\f
HGSS.1039.0028: Will this be the last card?!
HGSS.1039.0033:
Game clear!\f
You’ve found all of the hidden x2 and
x3 cards.\f
This means you’ve found all the Coins
in this game, so the game is now over.\f
HGSS.1039.0034:
If you quit now, you will
receive [0135,0000,0000] Coin(s).\r
Will you quit?
HGSS.1039.0037:
You haven’t found any Coins!
Are you sure you want to quit?
HGSS.1039.0042:
Congratulations!\f
You can receive even more Coins
in the next game!\f
